shortDescription: 4,400-11,000+ games (count varies by source/date) from 120+ software providers. No dedicated mobile app; fully mobile-optimized website
payoutTimes: First withdrawal each day is fee-free; subsequent same-day withdrawals incur a €2.50 fee per one source
license: Malta Gaming Authority — MGA/CRP/258/2014 (issued 19 May 2020); UK Gambling Commission — account number 39380; Swedish Gambling Authority (Spelinspektionen) — licence 18Li7373 (Sweden only); Danish Gambling Authority (Spillemyndigheden) — licence 18-0650512 (Denmark only); Alcohol and Gaming Commission of Ontario (AGCO) / iGaming Ontario — registration OPIG1267597 (since June 2023)
